title: User Sessions
description: Compact index of sessions for a user, including topic and summary pointers.

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user. Match the parent directory name.

sessions.description: Session metadata entries, most recent last.

ended_at.description: When the session ended. Omit if still active.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the session.

topic.description: Short topic label for the session.

summary_path.description: Relative path to the stored summary, if any.

tags.description: Optional tags tied to this session.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this sessions list.
